mcp_servers.description: names of Codex MCP servers (from ~/.codex/config.toml) to make available to step agents in the nested codex. Default none (lean). codex-workflow is always excluded (recursion guard).

agent.description: name of a ~/.codex/agents/*.toml role; its developer_instructions are injected as a prompt override (#26363 workaround)

parallel_group.description: steps sharing a group run concurrently (one group per v1)
